threshold_list.name: power_error_keywords
threshold_list.value1: power supply failure detected|predictive failure|ps failed|power unit input lost|redundant power supply degraded

check_script_lines: default='power supply failure detected|predictive failure|ps failed|power unit input lost|redundant power supply degraded',
message='dmesg POWER 로그 점검 명령 실행에 실패했습니다.',
lines = [line.strip() for line in (out or '').splitlines() if line.strip()]
reasons='전원 장애 관련 키워드가 확인되었습니다. 키워드별 검출 건수: ' + self._format_keyword_counts(keyword_counts),
reasons='전원 장애 관련 키워드가 검출되지 않았습니다. 키워드별 검출 건수: ' + self._format_keyword_counts(keyword_counts),

threshold_list.name: power_error_keywords
threshold_list.value1: power supply failure detected|predictive failure|ps failed|power unit input lost|redundant power supply degraded

power_error_matches.line: [   18.124102] ipmi_si dmi-ipmi-si.0: PSU2 status changed: predictive failure
[   18.124889] platform power_mon: PS Failed alarm asserted
[   18.125401] hwmon hwmon3: power unit input lost
[   18.126033] systemd[1]: Warning: redundant power supply degraded

thresholds.power_error_keywords: power supply failure detected|predictive failure|ps failed|power unit input lost|redundant power supply degraded

results.reasons: 전원 장애 관련 키워드가 확인되었습니다. 키워드별 검출 건수: power supply failure detected=0건, predictive failure=1건, ps failed=1건, power unit input lost=1건, redundant power supply degraded=1건
results.message: 전원 장애 관련 dmesg 로그가 확인되었습니다. 키워드별 검출 건수: power supply failure detected=0건, predictive failure=1건, ps failed=1건, power unit input lost=1건, redundant power supply degraded=1건. 임계치: power_error_keywords=power supply failure detected|predictive failure|ps failed|power unit input lost|redundant power supply degraded
